{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324002641AC1894FC7231D31B570C"}"},"total":606},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7458188441040995134","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"先是看了同名电视剧，非常震撼，演员表演节目制作都是很好的；然后就有了看看原著的想法，然后就用了两天时间几乎是一气呵成看完 很不错的一部作品，尤其是后面几章，电视剧好像是没有相关内容，所以原著更加完整","text_exts":[{"e":17,"s":15,"text":"演员","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%BC%94%E5%91%98&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774283201D31B570C%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227458188441040995134%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226944655941342088199%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%BC%94%E5%91%98%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736498573,"group_id":"6944655941342088199","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9T8hPVZ1o0+P7zHqdqfiVNlgV+fzaSA68lkr7mzbUT6","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/09a0339d0d474cff97af0da34f1831eb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776883283&x-signature=smUKCh9vn1nhq3u2IrkQPowe2z8%3D","user_id":"4362452324326478","user_name":"偶尔读书的爱猫人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4362452324326478","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6944655941342088199","book_info":{"abstract":""中国政治小说""第一人周梅森潜心八年、六易其稿,写就一部反腐高压下中国政治和官场生态的长幅画卷。根据本书改编而成的同名电视剧被誉为"2017开年大剧"、"中国顶级政治剧标杆",由陆毅、张丰毅等40余名实力戏骨联快出演!
一位国家部委的项目处长被人举报受贿千万,当最高人民检察院反贪总局侦查处处长侯亮平前来搜查时,看到的却是一位长相憨厚、衣着朴素的"老农民"在简陋破败的旧房里吃炸酱面。当这位腐败分子的面具被最终撕开的同时,与之案件牵连甚紧的H省京州市副市长丁义珍,却在一位神秘人物的暗中相助下,以反侦察手段逃脱法网,流亡海外。案件线索最终定位于由京州光明湖项目引发的一家H省国企大风服装厂的股权争夺,牵连其中的各派政治势力却盘根错节,扑朔迷离。H省检察院反贪局长陈海在调查行动中遭遇离奇的车祸。为了完成当年同窗的未竟事业,精明干练的侯亮平临危受命,接任陈海未完的事业.......","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/db41c2c59d0cccae8cdf5217a6e4441b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"周梅森
